message:
feat(atc): add CalibrationGuard safe-mode policy engine (Track 5)

Add CalibrationGuard struct that consumes signals from the martingale
engine (Track 11) and manages safe-mode entry/exit policy:
- Enters safe mode when e-process exceeds threshold or CUSUM detects
  a changepoint
- Exits safe mode after a configurable number of consecutive correct
  predictions (recovery_count)
- Tracks safe_mode_since timestamp for operational observability

Also:
- Import HashSet (was missing from std::collections)
- Cargo.lock: update asupersync to 0.2.8, bump franken-decision/
  evidence/kernel to 0.2.8, update windows-sys deps to 0.61.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
